name: unicode_bool_accent_fold
description: #555 Slice 2 — Unicode BOOLEAN consumer. Root{ok: bool, n: int} with ok="trué": the é leaves the ASCII strings.ToLower fast path unchanged ("trué" != "true"), so coerce_bool falls through to match_string, whose bamlunicode accent-fold (NFKD + combining-mark removal) reduces "trué" to "true" and CLAIMS true (StringToBool). Proves the bool match_string consumer folds non-ASCII byte-exact vs BAML. want is BAML v0.223 final parse; native==BAML for the fold is proven by the bamlunicode Rust reference.
